content.problemStatement:
Given a sorted array of integers AAA and a target integer XXX. Write a program to insert the target integer into the array such that the array remains sorted after the insertion.


Input Format

The first line contains an integer NNN representing the number of elements in the sorted array.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers representing the elements of the sorted array.
The third line contains the integer XXX to be inserted into the array.


Output Format
Print the elements of the modified sorted array, separated by spaces, after inserting XXX into the array.
